zh.Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Uchdrud ab Edwin於大約1050年出生在威爾士福林爾時，他的父親Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl32歲，母親Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn30歲。他於大約1070年與Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他於1094年登記服兵役。他去世於1116年之後在英國威爾斯福林爾。

zh-hans.Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Uchdrud ab Edwin于大约1050年出生在威尔士福林爾时，他的父亲Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl32岁，母亲Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn30岁。他于大约1070年与Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他于1094年登记服兵役。他去世于1116年之后在英国威尔斯福林爾。

nameMeanings.name: Edwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Arul, Chandra, Chitra, Kumar.

English: from the Middle English personal name Edwin (Old English Ēadwine, from ēad ‘prosperity’ + wine ‘friend’). The name Edwin is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Edison
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Ed(de) (a pet form of male and female names beginning with Ed-, such as Edwin , Edward , and Edith , all derived from Old English names beginning with ēad ‘prosperity’) + -son. Occasionally, the name may also be a shortened form of Middle English Edithson ‘son of Edith’, or come from the Middle English female personal name Edus (a pet form of Edith) + -son.

History: The inventor Thomas Alva Edison, born in 1847 in Milan, OH, came from a Canadian family first established in North America by John Edison, a loyalist during the American Revolution, who served under the British General Richard Howe and went into exile in NS, Canada, after the Revolutionary War.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Uchdrud ab Edwin was born about 1050, in Flintshire, Wales, his father, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, was 32 and his mother, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, was 30. He married Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan about 1070. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He registered for military service in 1094. He died after 1116, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Uchdrud ab Edwin est né environ 1050, à Flintshire, Galles, son père, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan environ 1070. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1094. Il est décédé après 1116, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Uchdrud ab Edwin um 1050 in Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl 32 und seine Mutter Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn 30. Er hat um 1070 Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er hat sich 1094 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb nach 1116 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Uchdrud ab Edwin è nato il circa 1050 nel Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan circa 1070. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1094. Morì dopo il 1116, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Uchdrud ab Edwinが約1050年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeinglは32歳，母Iwerydd Verch Cynfynは30歳であった。約1070年にNest ferch Llewelyn Fychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1094年に兵役登録をした。彼は1116年以後にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Uchdrud ab Edwin(이)가 대략 1050년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1070년 Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1094년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1116년 이후 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Uchdrud ab Edwin nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan aproximadamente 1070. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1094. Ele faleceu após 1116, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uchdrud ab Edwin родился около 1050 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan около 1070 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. В 1094 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер после 1116 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

sm.about 1050–after 1116: e tusa o le 1050–ina ua ma'ea le 1116

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Uchdrud ab Edwin nació aproximadamente 1050, en Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Edwin ap Gronwy of Tegeingl, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Iwerydd Verch Cynfyn, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Nest ferch Llewelyn Fychan aproximadamente 1070. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1094. Murió después de 1116, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
